step1.title1: Step 1: Make offline remittance and recharge through the exclusive account
step1.content1: You can go to the e-bank, mobile banking client, ATM or bank counter corresponding to your payment account to remit/transfer the corresponding amount to the receiving account of Aliyun.
step1.content2: Account name: Guangzhou Haliya Trading Co., LTD
step1.content3: Bank of deposit: Agricultural Bank of Guangzhou dongfeng Road Branch
step1.content5: ＊Note: Please be sure to keep the proof of successful remittance, such as: bank receipt, receipt, mobile phone screenshots, etc., for our verification.

step2.title1: Step 2: Upload the proof of successful remittance
step2.content1: Please send the proof of successful remittance generated in the first step, and we will verify the actual account information within 48 hours.

step3.title1: Step 3: Wait for the platform to verify the receipt information

step4.title1: Step 4: Wait for the platform to verify the receipt information
